description: A technician at a fuel bay is responsible for checking and topping up the fluids (fuel, oil, coolant) of every haul truck at the end of its shift.

nodes.task_description: A haul truck (HT-34) pulls into the fuel bay. Scan the equipment ID to bring up its record.

expected_outcome.expected: The truck's record is displayed on a mobile device.

nodes.task_description: Refuel the truck and check the levels for engine oil, coolant, and hydraulic fluid.

expected_outcome.expected: The truck is refueled, and the fluid levels are checked.

nodes.task_description: Top up the engine oil and record the amount added in the system. Log the service as complete.

expected_outcome.expected: The oil is topped up, and the consumption is logged in the CMMS, which helps track engine health.
